name: sugudasu
description: SUGUDASU — 無料ビジネスツール8選（静的サイト）

scripts.build:pages: node scripts/verify-tool-naming.mjs && node scripts/verify-ogp.mjs && node scripts/build-pages.mjs && node scripts/verify-pages-free-plan.mjs
scripts.release:pages:free: npm run build:pages && npm run guard:pages-budget && node scripts/guard-pages-build-budget.mjs consume
scripts.preview:pages: npm run build:pages && npx --yes serve dist -l 8080
